description:
SUMMER STARTS NOW | EXCLUSIVE DEAL BY BLACKLINE. With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2023 Range Rover HSE P400, 3.0TC I6, 4WD, 395bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 409,000 or AED 6,408 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 92,500 KM - Land Rover Warranty Valid Until 11th December 2027 or 150,000km - Comes with 2 Keys - GCC specification (Al Tayer) - Price includes VAT 
 - Panoramic Glass Roof - 360 Camera - Engine Auto Stop-Start Feature - Auto on/off Projector Beam LED (DRL) - Soft Close Doors - Electric Side-Steps - Meridian Signature Surround Sound System - Rear Entertainment System - 14 Way Electric Front Seats - Electric Powered Reclining Rear Seats - Massaging & Lumbar Support - Heated & Cooled Front Seats - Telescoping Steering Column - Remote Start - Valet Mode - Keyless Entry - Adaptive Cruise Control - Voice Activated Dual Zone Front & Rear AC - Windsor Genuine Wood Interior - Ambient Interior Lighting - Digital Instrument Cluster - Cooled Box Centre Console - Head-Up Display - Air Filtration - Blind Spot Assist - Emergency Braking - Rear Traffic Monitor - Lane Keep Assist - Park Assist - Apple Car Play - Electric Tailgate - Navigation
